mdSummary:
# AnimatedBeam

SVG beam that traces an animated gradient path between two DOM elements.

**Package:** `Lumeo.Motion` · **Category:** Motion
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/animated-beam

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AnimatedBeam | ContainerId | `string?` | `` | The id of the container element that holds both the from/to nodes and this AnimatedBeam. Coordinates are measured relative to this element (matching Magic UI's containerRef pattern). If null, the SVG's own bounding rect is used as fallback. |
| AnimatedBeam | FromId | `string?` | `` | The element id of the source node. |
| AnimatedBeam | ToId | `string?` | `` | The element id of the destination node. |
| AnimatedBeam | DurationMs | `int` | `3000` | Duration of one full beam cycle in milliseconds. |
| AnimatedBeam | DelayMs | `int` | `0` | Delay before the first animation cycle starts. |
| AnimatedBeam | Curvature | `double` | `0` | Curvature of the bezier path. 0 = straight. Positive = bows up. |
| AnimatedBeam | Reverse | `bool` | `false` | Reverses the direction of travel. |
| AnimatedBeam | GradientStartColor | `string` | `"#ffaa40"` | Color at the start of the gradient. |
| AnimatedBeam | GradientStopColor | `string` | `"#9c40ff"` | Color at the end of the gradient. |
| AnimatedBeam | PathColor | `string` | `"var(--color-border)"` | CSS color of the guide track path. |
| AnimatedBeam | PathWidth | `double` | `1` | Width of the guide track in px. |
| AnimatedBeam | PathOpacity | `double` | `0.3` | Opacity of the guide track (0–1). |
| AnimatedBeam | BeamWidth | `double` | `2` | Width of the animated beam stroke in px. |
| AnimatedBeam | Class | `string?` | `` | Additional CSS classes merged onto the root svg element. |
| AnimatedBeam | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` | Additional HTML attributes captured and forwarded to the root svg element. |

